notes: Auto-resume on empty Play — per-zone. When a play gesture fires and the paired Sonos has an empty transport (nothing loaded / queue cleared), the board restores the last stable source URI it saw playing on that zone and re-fires Play. Snapshot happens in refreshState() from GetMediaInfo whenever a stable-format URI is seen — x-sonosapi (favorites/stations), x-rincon-mp3radio (legacy internet radio), x-rincon-cpcontainer (Sonos playlists), x-sonos-http, x-file-cifs (SMB), plain http(s). Queue tokens (x-rincon-queue) are deliberately NOT snapshotted — they reference session-local queues that go stale. Stored per-board in NVS (single lastURI + lastMeta pair; board is 1:1 with a zone). Wiped on pairing change in selectSpeaker() and on /api/reset + /api/wizard/reset. Static cache in refreshState() prevents an NVS write on every 5s poll — only writes when the URI actually changes. Behavior: press play on a knob you've never touched in a week, and it starts playing whatever was last playing there.
